action.reasoning: Observation: official eval is 0.0 and current train.py/predict.py are truncated, so the pipeline is not yet reliable. Analysis: before another 2h eval, I need complete scripts plus a local runtime inspection of VLABench observations and a smoke rollout to validate the action bridge and evaluator call path. Decision: rewrite model/train/predict/smoke_env fully, add a stronger but still simple residual training objective, and run local smoke tests against one environment episode and checkpoint loading; only after that should I spend another official eval.
action.command: python -m py_compile model.py train.py predict.py smoke_env.py && python train.py --epochs 1 --batch_size 1 --max_episodes 4 --max_steps 64 --save_dir checkpoints/baseline && python smoke_env.py --task select_book --episode_index 0 --max_steps 3 --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline
